ddls:
CREATE TABLE "soil_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil sample */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sampling_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected (in cm) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "collector_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the collector */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of collection */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil (e.g., clay, loam, sand) */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop grown in the location (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location (in meters) */,
  "soil_texture" TEXT /* Texture of the soil in the location */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Current land use */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "soil_drainage" TEXT /* Drainage characteristics of the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_parameters" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the soil sample */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH value of the soil */,
  "EC" REAL /* Electrical conductivity (EC) of the soil */,
  "OC" REAL /* Organic carbon (OC) content of the soil */,
  "P" REAL /* Phosphorus (P) content of the soil */,
  "K" REAL /* Potassium (K) content of the soil */,
  "Ca" REAL /* Calcium (Ca) content of the soil */,
  "Mg" REAL /* Magnesium (Mg) content of the soil */,
  "S" REAL /* Sulfur (S) content of the soil */,
  "Zn" REAL /* Zinc (Zn) content of the soil */,
  "B" REAL /* Boron (B) content of the soil */,
  "Fe" REAL /* Iron (Fe) content of the soil */,
  "Cu" REAL /* Copper (Cu) content of the soil */,
  "Mn" REAL /* Manganese (Mn) content of the soil */,
  "NDVI" REAL /* Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the soil at the time of collection */,
  "moisture_content" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil */,
  "bulk_density" REAL /* Bulk density of the soil */,
  "cation_exchange_capacity" REAL /* Cation exchange capacity of the soil */,
  "organic_matter" REAL /* Organic matter content of the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_matrix" (
  "param1" TEXT /* First parameter in the correlation pair */,
  "param2" TEXT /* Second parameter in the correlation pair */,
  "correlation_value" REAL /* Correlation value between the two parameters */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the correlation is relevant */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date of the sample used for the correlation */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the correlation value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param1", "param2"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_matrix_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil sample the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, MD) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil sample being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version changes */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)
